name: Pengaturan Akun - Ubah Nama Profil, Toggle Dark/Light Mode (Skip Password)
description: Test pengaturan akun: ubah nama profil, toggle dark mode. Skip test ubah password. Login admin@inventory.com / password.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click the dark mode toggle button (title Ubah Tema) in the top navbar to switch to dark mode
The page switches to dark mode visually (background becomes dark)
Click the dark mode toggle button again to switch back to light mode
The page switches back to light mode
Click the user avatar or dropdown in the top navbar and navigate to Pengaturan Akun
Account settings page is visible showing Informasi Profil section
Clear the Nama Lengkap input field and type new name: Admin Inventory
Success message or green confirmation appears indicating profile was saved
Clear the Nama Lengkap input and restore original name: Admin
